LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT GRANTED ERIC HEFFELFINGER'S (OF LAW OFFICES OF PARVIG DARABI) MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFFS GUADALUPE TREJO, ROBERTO VILLATORO WITH THE CONDITION THAT COUNSEL APPEAR AT THE JUNE 19, 2007 DEPOSITION OR CONTINUE THE DEPOSITION TO ALLOW PLAINTIFFS TIME TO ATTAIN SUFFICIENT COUNSEL AT THE DEPOSITION. THE COURT ALLOWED AN IN-CAMERA HEARING. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189.

Notice And Motion For Order Compelling Pltfs' Depositions; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-31-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Joseph Hoffman, Esq., appeared for defendant & moving party: Major Auto Body Repair
Eric A. Heffelfinger, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & opposing party: Guadalupe Prejo
Ruling:
Hearing held. Defendant Major Auto Body Repair, Inc.'s Motion for Order Compelling Plaintiff's Deposition granted. Deposition to proceed on or before September 5, 2007. Notice of Order and Place and Time of deposition to be mailed to parties before 5:00 PM, 8/31/07. Sanction are denied. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-14-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Eric Heffelfinger, Esq. of Law Offices of Parvig Darabi, 650-343-5357 moving for withdrawal of attorney of record for plaintiffs Guadalupe Trejo and Roberto Villatoro

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT GRANTED Eric Heffelfinger, Esq. of Law Offices of Parvig Darabi's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFFS
GUADALUPE TREJO, ROBERTO VILLATORO WITH THE CONDITION THAT COUNSEL APPEAR AT THE JUNE 19, 2007 DEPOSITION OR CONTINUE THE DEPOSITION TO ALLOW PLAINTIFFS TIME TO ATTAIN SUFFICIENT COUNSEL AT THE DEPOSITION. THE COURT ALLOWED AN IN-CAMERA HEARING. Moving party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189. (301/PJB)
